export function Password(){const[cur,setCur]=useState('');const[np,setNp]=useState('');const[conf,setConf]=useState('');const[msg,setMsg]=useState(null);async function change(){if(!cur){setMsg({type:'error',text:'Enter current password'});return;}if(!np){setMsg({type:'error',text:'Enter new password'});return;}if(np!==conf){setMsg({type:'error',text:"Passwords don't match"});return;}if(np.length<6){setMsg({type:'error',text:'Minimum 6 characters'});return;}const res=await api.post('/change-password',{current_password:cur,new_password:np});if(res!==null&&res!==void 0&&res.success){setMsg({type:'success',text:'✓ Password changed!'});setCur('');setNp('');setConf('');}else setMsg({type:'error',text:(res===null||res===void 0?void 0:res.message)||'Failed'});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"page-header",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"page-title",children:"Update Password"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{maxWidth:420},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card",style:{display:'flex',flexDirection:'column',gap:14},children:[[['Current Password',cur,setCur],['New Password',np,setNp],['Confirm New Password',conf,setConf]].map(_ref4=>{let[label,val,setter]=_ref4;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"form-group",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{className:"form-label",children:label}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{className:"input",type:"password",value:val,onChange:e=>setter(e.target.value)})]},label);}),msg&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:`alert alert-${msg.type}`,children:msg.text}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn btn-primary",onClick:change,style:{justifyContent:'center'},children:"Change Password"})]})})]});}
